content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.1.1(i) WARN — fetched privacy policy states "We do not collect, process, or store your location data" but the app uses CoreLocation and stores GPS routes (App/RunSessionManager.swift:1,10–16), and metadata claims "maps every run with GPS" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:1).
Pierre: Apple rejects apps whose privacy policy directly contradicts observable data practices under 5.1.1(i). Your code requests when-in-use location and appends every CLLocation to a stored route, and your description advertises GPS tracking, yet the policy at https://runtracker.example/privacy denies any location processing. Update the policy to accurately describe on-device/iCloud location processing before submission.
